case_title: POLLYANNA GONCALVES VS. VAN CHI QUAN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-19-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-19-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF POLLYANNA GONCALVES IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT VAN CHI QUAN IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $0.00) SERVED SEP-19-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT QUAN, VAN CHI
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT QUAN, VAN CHI
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,157.00 FILED BY GONCALVES, POLLYANNA AS TO DEFENDANT QUAN, VAN CHI ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-19-2017 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-19-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONCALVES, POLLYANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT QUAN, VAN CHI $3,035.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,110.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
